Subagent: gsd-codebase-mapper. Phân tích Cluster A — Command Execution.

Files: src/tools/hivemind/execute-slash-command.ts, src/tools/hivemind/hivemind-command-engine.ts, src/routing/command-engine/ (glob rồi đọc hết), src/shared/types.ts (chỉ phần command-related), src/hooks/ (glob tìm "command")

Output: `.planning/codebase/COMMAND-EXECUTION-ANALYSIS-2026-05-18.md`

Nội dung bắt buộc:
A. Source File Documentation (mỗi file: purpose, exports, methods, state, errors, deps)
B. Data Flow (entry → routing → engine → execution → response, text diagram)
C. Conflict/Overlap (giữa execute-slash-command vs command-engine, definition vs execution, duplication)
D. OpenCode Innate Comparison (OpenCode slash command vs tools này, gaps vs redundant)
E. Custom Tools Criteria (9 tiêu chí, score 1-5 each)

Date-stamp: 2026-05-18. Viết bằng tiếng Việt phần mô tả, English cho code refs. Max 500 LOC. Trả về: file path + tóm tắt findings.
